test_cases.name: happy_path_product_side_hustle
test_cases.scenario: User provides a complete, well-defined product-based side hustle idea with all required inputs and known costs; skill executes all phases and produces actionable financial model.

input.idea_description: Handmade ceramic mugs with custom designs for coffee enthusiasts
input.target_market: Remote workers aged 25-40 who value artisanal home goods

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes all 7 phases, produces complete financial model with 12-month projections for all three scenarios, identifies break-even month (likely month 4-6), validates time commitment feasibility, and recommends Go or Conditional based on metrics.
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

test_cases.name: happy_path_service_side_hustle
test_cases.scenario: User provides a service-based side hustle (freelance consulting) with minimal startup costs; skill produces financial model showing quick break-even and strong unit economics.

input.idea_description: LinkedIn profile optimization consulting for job seekers transitioning to tech careers
input.target_market: Career changers aged 30-50 seeking tech roles

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies strong unit economics (contribution margin ~$115), calculates break-even within 1-2 months, validates time commitment (12 hours/week supports 6 consultations/month), and recommends Go.
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement

test_cases.name: edge_case_vague_idea_description
test_cases.scenario: User provides a vague idea description ('make money online') that fails Phase 1 specificity gate; skill adjusts by requesting clarification.

input.revenue_model: charge what the market will bear

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects vague inputs in Phase 1, rejects the idea, and returns error response with specific guidance: 'Idea must include product/service type, target customer, and value proposition. Example: Handmade jewelry for eco-conscious women aged 25-35. Please revise.'

test_cases.name: edge_case_negative_unit_margin
test_cases.scenario: User provides a revenue model where variable cost per unit exceeds price per unit (e.g., $50 price, $60 COGS); skill detects negative margin in Phase 4 and aborts.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes Phase 1-3 successfully, then in Phase 4 detects that variable cost ($60) > price ($50), calculates negative contribution margin, and aborts with message: 'Business model not viable. Variable cost per unit ($60) exceeds price per unit ($50). Recommend: (1) increase price to $75+, or (2) reduce COGS to $35 or below. Do not proceed until unit economics are positive.'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement

test_cases.name: edge_case_unrealistic_monthly_units
test_cases.scenario: User provides an estimated monthly unit volume that is unrealistic for a brand-new side hustle (e.g., 500 units/month with no market validation); skill adjusts by capping at 50 units/month.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects that user's implicit expectation (based on growth rate) would lead to unrealistic month-1 volume, caps month 1 at 10-15 units, applies 10% growth, and notes in assumption_log: 'Month 1 units capped at 15 (conservative for new side hustle with no market validation). Recommend validating demand with 20+ pre-orders before launch.'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement

test_cases.name: quality_gate_break_even_boundary
test_cases.scenario: User provides inputs that result in break-even exactly at month 12 (boundary condition); skill correctly identifies profitability month and flags as 'long-term investment'.

input.idea_description: Online course on personal finance for millennials

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill calculates that with 8% monthly growth starting at ~8 enrollments/month, cumulative cash turns positive in month 11-12. Recommendation is 'Conditional: pursue if you can secure $2,000 in funding to sustain losses for 12 months, and validate demand with 50+ email signups before launch.'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

test_cases.name: error_handling_no_market_validation
test_cases.scenario: User provides a side hustle idea with no market validation evidence; skill flags risk and recommends validation method in Phase 2.

input.idea_description: AI-powered meal planning app for busy professionals

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes Phase 2 and detects no market validation. Output includes: market_validation: {validation_method: 'none', findings: 'no validation conducted', confidence_level: 'low', risk_flag: true, recommendation_if_unvalidated: 'Conduct 10+ customer interviews with target users: "Would you pay $9.99/month for AI meal planning?" Create landing page and measure 100+ email signups before development.'}. Recommendation is 'Conditional: pursue only if you validate demand with 100+ email signups and 10+ customer interviews showing willingness to pay.'
phase_coverage: Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

test_cases.name: quality_gate_time_commitment_infeasible
test_cases.scenario: User provides available hours that are insufficient for projected unit volume in month 6; skill flags time commitment as infeasible and recommends adjustments.

input.target_market: Pet owners aged 35-65 with disposable income

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill calculates: hours_per_unit = 4 hours (hand-painted portrait). Month 6 projected units = ~3 (with 20% growth from month 1 = 1 unit). Projected hours month 6 = 3 * 4 = 12 hours. Available hours = 5 * 4.33 = 21.65 hours/month. Feasible = true. However, if growth accelerates to month 12, projected units could reach 6-8, requiring 24-32 hours/month. Skill flags: 'time_commitment_validation: {feasible: false, flag: true, recommendation: "Month 12 projects 8 units requiring 32 hours/month, but only 21.65 hours available. Recommend: (1) increase available hours to 8/week, (2) reduce growth target to 10%/month, or (3) outsource fulfillment to assistant."}'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

test_cases.name: edge_case_high_sensitivity_single_driver
test_cases.scenario: User's business model shows high sensitivity to a single variable (e.g., price); skill identifies this in sensitivity analysis and flags as critical success factor.

input.idea_description: Dropshipping niche electronics from overseas suppliers

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill performs sensitivity analysis: base case 12-month profit = $1,200. Price +10% ($132) → profit = $2,400 (+100% impact). Price -10% ($108) → profit = $0 (break-even, -100% impact). Skill flags: 'Price is a critical driver. A 10% price decrease eliminates profitability. Critical success factor: validate price elasticity with 20+ customer interviews. Ensure customers perceive value at $120 price point.'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

test_cases.name: happy_path_digital_product_with_validation
test_cases.scenario: User provides a digital product idea with existing market validation (email signups, pre-sales); skill incorporates validation into model and recommends Go.

input.idea_description: Notion template bundle for freelance project management

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes all phases. In Phase 2, user provides: 'Pre-sold 15 bundles at $29 to email list of 200 people (7.5% conversion).' Skill assigns confidence_level: high, risk_flag: false. Break-even analysis shows break-even in month 1 (contribution margin $28, fixed costs $20, break-even = 1 unit). Recommendation: 'Go. Strong unit economics, immediate profitability, and validated demand. Next steps: (1) launch marketing campaign to email list, (2) create content marketing strategy for SEO, (3) track customer feedback and iterate template design.'
phase_coverage: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

phases.phase: Phase 4: Monthly Operating Costs & Revenue Model Refinement
Phase 7: Scenario Synthesis, Sensitivity Analysis & Recommendation

quality_gates.gate: Phase 1: Idea specificity (product/service type, target customer, value proposition)
Phase 4: Variable cost per unit < price per unit
Phase 5: Break-even units per month achievable
Phase 6: All three projections span full projection period
Phase 7: Scenario comparison clear and actionable
Phase 7: Sensitivity analysis identifies 3+ key drivers
Phase 7: Recommendation justified by financial model

error_handlers.error: Phase 4: Variable cost per unit exceeds price per unit
Phase 7: Time commitment validation shows infeasibility
Phase 7: Sensitivity analysis shows business fragility
